step1.title: You ARE the Pet
step1.desc: Use arrow keys to move around the grid. Find the treat!

step2.title: Now You're Blindfolded
step2.desc: The screen goes dark. Can you find the treat from memory?

step3.title: The Learning Loop
step3.desc: Watch your pet learn to find the treat on its own!

step4.title: The Big Question
step4.desc: There are MANY ways to teach your pet to learn. Each island teaches a different method. Which route will you sail first?

map.title: The Sea of Intelligence
map.hardRouteWarning: This route explores advanced ideas. We recommend starting with Value Archipelago — but you're the captain! Ready to set sail?

bandit.name: Port Bandit
bandit.metaphor: A row of treasure chests — which one pays out the most?

qtable.name: Port Q-Table
qtable.metaphor: Drawing a treasure map — mark how good each spot is.

deep.name: Port Deep
deep.metaphor: The treasure map is too big to draw by hand — train a pattern recognition assistant!

boss.name: The Greedy Pirate
boss.desc: A pirate who ALWAYS picks the highest immediate reward. Can your trained agent outperform pure greed?
